name: Show Stopper Detailing
tagline: Premium Mobile Detailing. At Your Door.

policies.deposit: A deposit is required at booking and applied toward the total service balance. Custom quote services require approval before any deposit.
policies.cancellation: 24+ hours notice: reschedule or cancel with no penalty. Less than 24 hours: deposit is non-refundable. No-shows: deposit forfeited.

seo.title: Show Stopper Detailing | Premium Mobile Detailing in Durham, NC & the Triangle
seo.description: Professional mobile auto detailing in Durham, Raleigh, Cary, Chapel Hill & the Triangle. Hand car wash, full detail, window tint. We come to you. Book now.
